notes: Playground /providers/local page loads only custom-font.woff2 (3 requests, all woff2 format). Bug requires testing with same font in both ttf and woff2 formats co-existing to check priority. Default playground only has woff2 files - no ttf counterpart exists to test format priority. Cannot reproduce the ttf-over-woff2 priority bug without modifying project config to add ttf files alongside woff2.
